---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for TSN-Affinity
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Impact

- Who would benefit from this feature?
- How would it change the API or usage?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this has not been requested before
- [ ] I have checked if this feature aligns with the project's goals
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this feature (optional)
